forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 57. West wind around 10 mph.

forecast.name: Friday
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny. High near 68, with temperatures falling to around 66 in the afternoon. West wind 8 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph.

weather_report:
In the crisp embrace of the early morning, Downtown San Francisco reveals itself partly cloaked in clouds, as a gentle rustling of west winds announces a serene transition from night to day. The air, a cool 57 degrees, carries the promise of a fresh start. As the dawn unwinds, the city is set to bathe in the warm caress of the sun, a delightful contrast to the lingering shadows of the night. By noon, temperatures are expected to dance around the mid-60s, tempered by the airy embrace of breezes swaying between 8 to 16 miles per hour, with occasional gusts racing ahead to 24.

While the early hours hold onto a semblance of fog, a familiar whisper of the marine layer, it is predicted to ease, allowing the signature charm of this city to take center stage. The clarity of the day holds potential promise—an ideal moment to unearth your lightest sweater or jacket, layering against the coolness that clings softly in the corners of the afternoon. As the day unfolds, consider wandering through the local cafes, where the aroma of freshly brewed coffee mingles with the chatter of morning-goers. Or perhaps visit the parks, where the delicate sunlight invites leisurely strolls or simply a moment to breathe amidst the city’s rhythm. In the heart of it all, one can find a blend of serenity and bustling energy, perfect for gently navigating the day ahead.
